asset.title: Startup Diligence Live Join
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: An excellent walkthrough demonstrating real-time multi-user collaboration in a startup diligence room. The flow is complete, clear, and highly professional.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows the creation of a room, copying the invite code, and another user joining to collaborate in real-time.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the entire lifecycle from room creation to sharing, joining, and sending the first chat message.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode interface with well-structured panels, though the layout is quite dense.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with NodeRoom's concepts of binders, traces, and multi-agent collaboration.

evidenceQuality.evidence: High-fidelity screen recording showing actual browser interactions and real-time state synchronization.

legibility.evidence: Main UI elements and captions are highly legible, though some sidebar text is small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly demonstrates a collaborative war-room setup for financial diligence, highly relevant to target users.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the multi-user synchronization process without artificial speedups.

defects.observed: The sidebar text in the Room Binder is quite small and dense, which might be hard to read on smaller screens.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the font size or contrast of the sidebar items for better readability.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: See how teams collaborate in real-time inside a NodeRoom startup diligence war room, sharing live artifacts and coordinating agents.
